message:
test: add cross-module integration test for scan_pipeline → rate_limit_tracker

Exercises the output-analysis → rate-limit-tracking flow: raw pane bytes
are scanned for error/rate-limit patterns, then trigger results drive
per-pane per-provider rate-limit state with cooldown expiry and GC.

7 tests covering: error detection without rate-limit, rate-limit detection
with cooldown, multi-pane multi-agent isolation, chunked vs batch parity,
cooldown expiry + GC cleanup, custom trigger patterns, and metrics/telemetry
consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
